leadText: Amnesia (Japanese: ドわすれ Memory Lapse) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation I. It was TR17 in Pokémon Sword and Shield, and is TM128 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I 1.2 Generation II onwards 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] Amnesia increases the user's Special by two stages. Generation II onwards [ edit | edit source ] Amnesia now raises the user's Special Defense by two stages instead . Amnesia is a part of Contest Spectacular combination and using it will cause Baton Pass and Stored Power to give an extra three appeal points if used in the next turn. If powered up by a Psychium Z into Z-Amnesia, all of the user's lowered stats are reset. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Status Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power — Cooldown 9s Move wind-up time 1 frame Effect duration 30s 33s Additional effect — — — None

Def stat for a while by temporarily emptying its mind to forget all concerns.
